features.name: assert property with constant-true enable signal
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property guarded by an enable signal that is driven by a constant 1, making the assertion unconditionally active

features.name: assume property with constant-false enable signal
features.description: Code should include an SVA assume property guarded by an enable signal that is driven by a constant 0, making the assumption permanently disabled (dead assume)

features.name: assert property with constant-false enable signal
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property guarded by an enable signal that is driven by a constant 0, rendering the assertion permanently disabled and effectively dead

features.name: assert property with trivially-true boolean constant condition
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property whose entire condition expression reduces to a boolean constant true (1'b1), making the assertion trivially satisfied and removable by optimization

features.name: cover property with trivially-true boolean constant condition
features.description: Code should include an SVA cover property whose condition is a constant true (1'b1), which is trivially always covered but must be preserved to avoid degrading DV coverage metrics

features.name: cover property with constant-true enable signal
features.description: Code should include an SVA cover property guarded by an enable signal that is a constant 1, making the cover unconditionally active with the enable redundant
